Staked G$ earns rewards. Slashed G$ goes to UBI pool.         Unstaking requires a 7-day unbonding period to prevent:         - Stake-to-vote attacks (bond, vote, unbond in same block)         - Slashing evasion (cannot front-run a slash transaction)         A validator can have at most one pending unbonding request.
